roadmap.goal: Slice 03: blocked-count over-time chart. Slice 04: Blocked → Stale linkage — blocked-duration staleness OR'd into deriveStaleness with distinct reason.
roadmap.overview: Two-phase DELIVER. Phase 03 (complete, 5 steps): BlockedCountSnapshot + recorder + endpoint + FE chart. Phase 04 (5 steps): blockedStalenessThresholdDays settings contract (model/column/DTO/write/validation/migration), DISTILL scenarios 17-21, deriveStaleness selector extension (StalenessResult), 3 call sites + prop threading, FE settings pass-through + UI + Zod.

validation.notes: Phase 03 APPROVED (mutation 79.1%). Phase 04 added — pending roadmap review before DELIVER execution.

out_of_scope: Per-type historical filtering (scenario #16) — @deferred UC-2; additive follow-up with no-rework guarantee
Retroactive backfill / reconstruction (forward-only by product decision)
Per-item drill-down on the chart (slice 04 territory)
Lighthouse-Clients CLI/MCP wrapper (separate repo, ADR-072 handoff)
Playwright E2E for slice 03 (covered by backend ATs + FE Vitest)
Playwright E2E for slice 04 (stale rendering covered by backend ATs + FE Vitest per component)

phases.name: Blocked-items over-time chart
phases.description: Forward-only BlockedCountSnapshot + recorder + blockedCountHistory endpoint + FE chart

steps.name: BlockedCountSnapshot entity, repository, EF config, unique index, migration
steps.description: TDD substrate: entity, IBlockedCountSnapshotRepository, DbSet with unique index (OwnerId, OwnerType, RecordedAt), SQLite+Postgres migrations via CreateMigration.ps1, real-provider migration tests.
criteria: BlockedCountSnapshot persists Id, OwnerId, OwnerType, RecordedAt (DateOnly), BlockedCount
EF config registers DbSet with unique index on (OwnerId, OwnerType, RecordedAt)
IBlockedCountSnapshotRepository registered in Program.cs
Migrations generated via CreateMigration.ps1 for SQLite + Postgres
Real-provider migration tests pass; dotnet build zero warnings; dotnet test green

steps.name: BlockedCountSnapshotRecordingHandler forward recorder + Earned-Trust probes
steps.description: Forward recorder on TeamDataRefreshed and PortfolioFeaturesRefreshed. Counts IsBlocked via IBlockedItemService, date-keyed upsert. Earned-Trust probes: freshness, idempotency, single-definition.
criteria: Reacts to TeamDataRefreshed and PortfolioFeaturesRefreshed
Counts items where IBlockedItemService.IsBlocked is true
Date-keyed upsert: one row per (OwnerId, OwnerType, RecordedAt) per day
Freshness probe: recorded count equals live count(IsBlocked)
Idempotency probe: same-day re-run produces exactly one row
Single-definition probe: count derives only from IBlockedItemService
dotnet build zero warnings; dotnet test green; Stryker >= 80%

steps.name: blockedCountHistory read endpoint + enable scenario #14
steps.description: NEW GET .../teams/{id}/metrics/blockedCountHistory and .../portfolios/{id}/metrics/blockedCountHistory. Returns BlockedCountSnapshotDto[] under RbacGuard(TeamRead/PortfolioRead). Enable scenario #14.
criteria: GET returns BlockedCountSnapshotDto[] over [startDate, endDate] window
Existing class-level RbacGuard(TeamRead/PortfolioRead) applies
Side-effect-free GET (no writes)
Slice03BlockedTrendSpecifications seeds BlockedCountSnapshot rows
Scenario #14 [Ignore] removed and passes
dotnet build zero warnings; dotnet test green

steps.name: Honest empty-state contract + enable scenario #15 (#16 stays deferred)
steps.description: Enable scenario #15 A_new_team_sees_an_honest_empty_trend. No snapshots returns empty array (never flat zero). Scenario #16 stays [Ignore]'d (UC-2 deferred).
criteria: Empty owner returns empty JSON array (never zero-padded)
Scenario #15 [Ignore] removed and passes
Scenario #16 stays [Ignore]'d with UC-2 DEFERRED reason
dotnet build zero warnings; dotnet test green

steps.name: Frontend BlockedItemsOverTimeChart + Zod + Vitest
steps.description: FE chart in Flow Metrics chart area (NOT overview widget). Empty-state copy 'blocked trend builds forward from today — no snapshots yet'. Zod schema validates response at trust boundary. Red bar color (errorColor #f44336). Composes with team/portfolio/date-range filter.
steps.scenario_name: renders the blocked-count trend and forward-only empty state
criteria: Chart in Flow Metrics chart area, NOT overview widget
Rising series rendered; empty series shows forward-only empty state
Zod schema validates blockedCountHistory response at trust boundary
Red bar color (errorColor #f44336)
Composes with team/portfolio/date-range filter; per-type NOT wired
pnpm test green; pnpm build zero TS/Biome/Vite warnings

phases.name: Blocked → Stale linkage
phases.description: blockedStalenessThresholdDays settings contract + deriveStaleness selector extension + call site migration + FE settings UI

steps.name: blockedStalenessThresholdDays — model column, DTO, write path, validation, EF migration
steps.description: Add blockedStalenessThresholdDays as twin of StalenessThresholdDays on WorkTrackingSystemOptionsOwner (virtual int, default 0), Team.cs + Portfolio.cs overrides, SettingsOwnerDtoBase constructor + property, TeamExtensions + PortfolioExtensions settings write, TeamController + PortfolioController range validation (0-365, reuses existing Min/MaxStalenessThresholdDays), EF migration via CreateMigration.ps1 for SQLite + Postgres, real-provider migration test.
steps.scenario_name: blockedStalenessThresholdDays column migrates cleanly on SQLite/Postgres
criteria: blockedStalenessThresholdDays column on WorkTrackingSystemOptionsOwner (virtual int, default 0)
Team.cs + Portfolio.cs override the virtual property
SettingsOwnerDtoBase exposes blockedStalenessThresholdDays in constructor + property
TeamExtensions.SyncTeamWithTeamSettings + PortfolioExtensions.SyncWithPortfolioSettings persist the field on settings write
TeamController.UpdateTeam + PortfolioController.UpdatePortfolio validate range 0-365 (reuses MinStalenessThresholdDays/MaxStalenessThresholdDays)
Migrations generated via CreateMigration.ps1 for SQLite + Postgres
Real-provider migration test passes on both providers
dotnet build zero warnings; dotnet test green

steps.name: Enable DISTILL scenarios 17–21 (settings contract acceptance)
steps.description: Un-ignore all 5 Slice04BlockedStaleness scenarios. Scenarios 17 (round-trip), 18 (default zero), 19 (below range rejected), 20 (above range rejected) go RED → GREEN. Scenario 21 (non-admin 403) PASS-WHEN-ENABLED via pre-existing TeamWrite guard.
criteria: Scenario 17 The_blocked_staleness_threshold_is_saved_and_read_back [Ignore] removed and passes
Scenario 18 A_new_team_defaults_the_blocked_staleness_threshold_to_zero [Ignore] removed and passes
Scenario 19 A_blocked_staleness_threshold_below_range_is_rejected [Ignore] removed and passes
Scenario 20 A_blocked_staleness_threshold_above_range_is_rejected [Ignore] removed and passes
Scenario 21 A_non_admin_cannot_change_the_blocked_staleness_threshold [Ignore] removed — PASS-WHEN-ENABLED (pre-existing 403 guard)
dotnet build zero warnings; dotnet test --filter BlockedItems green (21 total)

steps.name: deriveStaleness selector — StalenessResult types, blocked-duration logic, comprehensive Vitest
steps.description: Extend deriveStaleness from boolean → StalenessResult per ADR-070. New types: StalenessReason (driver: time-in-state|blocked-duration; context: context-time-in-state), StalenessResult {isStale, reasons[]}. StalenessCandidate gains blockedSince? + currentStateName fields. Time-in-state preserves !isBlocked guard + emits context-time-in-state when blocked-duration fires (UC-1 driver+context split). Blocked-duration uses ≥ (OQ1), time-in-state keeps >. Comprehensive Vitest: ADR-026 preservation, new trigger, driver+context, boundary probes (at-threshold + one-over), disabled probe, stale-once.
steps.scenario_name: deriveStaleness returns StalenessResult with correct drivers, context, and boundaries
criteria: StalenessCandidate exposes blockedSince? (string|null) and currentStateName (string)
deriveStaleness returns StalenessResult {isStale: boolean, reasons: StalenessReason[]}
Time-in-state trigger: stalenessThresholdDays > 0 && !isBlocked && daysInState > threshold → driver entry; isBlocked=true emits context-time-in-state when both triggers could fire
Blocked-duration trigger: blockedStalenessThresholdDays > 0 && isBlocked && blockedSince valid && blockedDays ≥ threshold → driver entry
ADR-026 preserved: !isBlocked guard in time-in-state branch; blocked item never emits time-in-state driver
Boundary: blocked-duration uses ≥ (at-threshold=stale), time-in-state uses > (at-threshold NOT stale)
Vitest covering: ADR-026 preservation, new trigger, driver+context (UC-1), boundary probes, disabled (threshold=0), stale-once
pnpm test -- deriveStaleness green; pnpm build zero TS/Biome warnings

steps.name: 3 call sites — StalenessResult consumption + blockedStalenessThresholdDays prop threading + Vitest
steps.description: Update all deriveStaleness call sites to consume StalenessResult (not boolean). Thread blockedStalenessThresholdDays prop from TeamMetricsView/PortfolioMetricsView → BaseMetricsView → TimeInStateBadge + StaleOverviewWidget + WorkItemAgingChart. Exhaustive selector-use audit per ADR-070 mandate (grep, verify every call site). Vitest per component: stale-once rendering, driver+context reasons shown, cross-surface consistency.
criteria: TimeInStateBadge reads result.isStale + renders result.reasons in tooltip; accepts blockedStalenessThresholdDays prop
BaseMetricsView StaleOverviewWidget count filters on result.isStale (not raw boolean); passes blockedStalenessThresholdDays to selector
WorkItemAgingChart stale dots use result.isStale; passes blockedStalenessThresholdDays to selector
Exhaustive selector-use audit: grep all deriveStaleness call sites → every one consumes .isStale + .reasons[] (no residual boolean read)
All three surfaces render identical stale emphasis for same input (Earned-Trust probe per ADR-070)
component-level Vitest: stale-once rendering, driver+context reasons, cross-surface consistency
pnpm test green (badge + BaseMetricsView + WorkItemAgingChart suites); pnpm build zero TS/Biome/Vite warnings

steps.name: FE settings pass-through + Zod + Flow Metrics Configuration UI twin
steps.description: Add blockedStalenessThresholdDays to IBaseSettings + all defaults (EditTeam/EditPortfolio/CreateTeamWizard/CreatePortfolioWizard → 0). Thread through read chain: TeamMetricsView/PortfolioMetricsView → BaseMetricsView. Zod at trust boundary (rolling-adoption — new field only). FlowMetricsConfigurationComponent: twin UI (checkbox toggle + number field, identical pattern to StalenessThresholdDays). TestDataProvider seeds default 0. Vitest: settings defaults, UI toggle, pass-through chain.
criteria: IBaseSettings gains blockedStalenessThresholdDays: number (twin of stalenessThresholdDays)
EditTeam/EditPortfolio/CreateTeamWizard/CreatePortfolioWizard default blockedStalenessThresholdDays to 0
TeamMetricsView/PortfolioMetricsView read blockedStalenessThresholdDays from settings and pass through BaseMetricsView to call sites
Zod validates blockedStalenessThresholdDays ≥ 0 at settings trust boundary (rolling-adoption rule — new field only)
FlowMetricsConfigurationComponent renders twin UI (checkbox toggle + number field) with same pattern as stalenessThresholdDays
TestDataProvider seeds blockedStalenessThresholdDays: 0
Vitest: settings defaults (component tests), UI toggle (FlowMetricsConfigurationComponent.test.tsx), pass-through chain (BaseMetricsView.test.tsx)
pnpm test green; pnpm build zero TS/Biome/Vite warnings

walking_skeleton.scenario: A delivery lead can open the Blocked Items over-time chart and see the daily blocked count trend
walking_skeleton.coverage_estimate: End-to-end through the read adapter via WebApplicationFactory with real EF

frontend: pnpm test all Vitest suites green (3487 tests + Phase 04 additions)
pnpm build zero TypeScript, Biome, Vite warnings
architecture: ArchUnitNET tests pass with no new violations
Exhaustive deriveStaleness call-site audit: grep confirms no residual boolean reads (ADR-070 mandate)
clients: Lighthouse-Clients repo: blockedStalenessThresholdDays is additive settings field — NO version gate (ADR-064/056 rule, per ADR-070 §3)
Lighthouse-Clients repo: must add version-gated blockedCountHistory wrapper with FEATURE_REQUIRES_SERVER_NEWER_THAN > v26.6.7.1 (ADR-072 handoff — NOT edited in this repo)
